name: stock-valuation-insider-signals
description: Insider-buying clusters, share-buyback signals, and Damodaran DCF/relative valuation for US equities.
long_description:
Adds four MCP tools to Claude Desktop that surface insider-trading and corporate-action signals from a local SQLite snapshot of SEC EDGAR + Form-4 data, plus a full Damodaran-style valuation pipeline:

- **get-signal-scanner** — ranks tickers by a size-adjusted composite of insider-buying clusters + share-buyback intensity. Mid-cap is the sweet spot; micro-cap is down-weighted to suppress noise.
- **get-cluster-detail** — per-ticker view returning BOTH insider activity AND buyback status, with market-cap tier and percentile rank.
- **get-buyback-status** — dedicated yes/no + magnitude buyback check, independent of the scanner intensity gate.
- **run-valuation** — DCF + relative-multiples valuation with a verdict (UNDERVALUED / FAIRLY VALUED / OVERVALUED).

Data ships as a monthly snapshot (~98 MB compressed) downloaded from GitHub Releases on first launch. No API keys required for the default install.

tools.name: get-signal-scanner
tools.description: Rank tickers by a size-adjusted composite of insider-buying clusters + share-buyback intensity. Returns a ranked list with tier, percentile, and adjusted scores.

tools.name: get-cluster-detail
tools.description: Per-ticker report combining insider-buying activity AND share-buyback status. Returns market-cap tier, percentile rank, raw + relevance scores, recent insider trades, and a rendered UI card.

tools.name: get-buyback-status
tools.description: Yes/no + magnitude buyback check for a single ticker, independent of the scanner intensity gate. Returns tier-adjusted relevance score.

tools.name: run-valuation
tools.description: Damodaran-style DCF + relative-multiples valuation. Returns intrinsic value, current price, verdict, assumptions, and folds in the insider signal.

api_port.title: FastAPI Backend Port
api_port.description: Local port for the FastAPI bridge. Change only if 8502 conflicts with another service.

fmp_api_key.title: FMP API Key (optional)
fmp_api_key.description: Financial Modeling Prep API key. Only needed if you want to refresh data beyond the monthly snapshot.
